update.title: Update | Bloumechat
update.checking_desc: We are looking for the latest version of Bloumechat on our servers.
update.available_desc: A new version of Bloumechat ({{version}}) is available.
update.uptodate_desc: Congratulations ! You are already using the most recent version of Bloumechat.
update.downloading_desc: Downloading new files... Please do not close the application.
update.ready_desc: Everything is ready ! Click the button below to install the update.
update.idle_desc: Keep your application up to date to enjoy the latest features.

tray.trayNotice: BloumeChat is still running in the background. Click the icon to reopen.
